name: Blink
description: Roll 1d6 at the end of each of your turns for the duration; on a 4-6 you vanish to the Ethereal Plane (perceiving the plane you left in gray, out to 60 feet) and return at the start of your next turn to a chosen unoccupied space within 10 feet. While ethereal you can be affected only by other ethereal creatures. Engine: the phase-out evasion is descriptive only — no Ethereal Plane modelled.
